title: Martin Sedlak
text: Home * People * Martin Sedlak Martin Sedlák , a Czech software engineer and computer chess programmer. He began chess programming in 2006 and his UCI compliant engine Cheng , hosted by Emil Vlasák , represents about three years of development [1] . Martin Sedlák is further author of the TLCV client livius [2] , along with Cheng4 available at GitHub under the permissive zlib license [3] .
